title: Element Name
description: The name of a UI element definition key. Can be a simple identifier or use @-style inheritance to extend another element.

anyOf.title: Simple Element Name
anyOf.description: A simple element name without inheritance.

anyOf.title: Inherited Element Name
anyOf.description: An element name with @-style inheritance syntax. The part before @ is the new name (may be empty), and the part after @ is the parent element to inherit from, optionally prefixed with a namespace.
